mapper.select: select c.comment_id, c.catch_id, c.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, c.reply_to_id, c.reply_to_user, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, c.content, c.status, c.create_time from fish_catch_comment c left join fish_user u on u.user_id = c.user_id left join fish_user ru on ru.user_id = c.reply_to_user where c.catch_id = #{catchId} and c.status = 1 order by c.create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into fish_catch_comment (catch_id, user_id, reply_to_id, reply_to_user, content, status, create_time) values (#{catchId}, #{userId}, #{replyToId}, #{replyToUser}, #{content}, 1, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_catch_comment set status = 2 where comment_id = #{commentId}
update fish_catch_record set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where catch_id = #{catchId}
update fish_catch_record set comment_count = greatest(comment_count - 1, 0) where catch_id = #{catchId}
